description: Scope: only the runtime image's inputs - npm deps and the Node base image in the Dockerfile.
Excludes docker-compose (only references our own :latest image) and github-actions (CI-only, bumped by hand).
Auto-merge is limited to changes that cannot introduce a breaking change; everything else is surfaced on the Dependency Dashboard with no PR.

packageRules.description: npm: auto-merge patch-only (bugfixes, no API change) for runtime AND dev deps. Native auto-merge waits for green CI.
npm: never touch minors or majors automatically. They appear on the Dependency Dashboard but open no PRs.
Node base image: auto-merge digest + patch + minor (stays in the Node 20 LTS line, non-breaking).
Node base image: block the major bump (20 -> 22). Deliberate manual move only.
